Our Story
"Ten years passed almost quietly — somewhere between the ordinary days and the unforgettable ones."

We met at university, when days were measured in semesters and coffee breaks, and the future felt both distant and full of promise.

What began as shared lectures and long conversations slowly became a life lived side by side. Over ten years, we grew — from students into working adults, from familiar streets to building a home in the UK.

We learned that love is not just found in big moments, but in showing up, again and again, through change, uncertainty, and everyday life.

So after ten years together, we decided it was time to say "yes" — not to something new, but to what we had been choosing all along. And yes… we're finally making it official.

A Quick Introduction

Meet Chambolle

Pembroke Welsh Corgi. Named after the village in Burgundy that started one of our favourite shared passions. Chief greeter and general manager of household morale.

RSVP
Venue: The Salisbury Room at The Peninsula Hong Kong
Attire: Elegant Evening Attire
17:00 – 18:00
Guest Arrival
Guests are welcome to arrive early and enjoy light refreshments. Complimentary Mahjong will be available while you mingle and settle in before the ceremony.
18:30 – 19:30
Wedding Ceremony
Together with our families, we invite you to celebrate our wedding at The Salisbury Room.
19:45 – 23:00
Dinner Reception
As the evening unfolds, we invite you to gather with us for a dinner celebration filled with warmth, gratitude, and joy. A traditional Chinese wedding banquet will be served, paired with a thoughtfully curated wine list selected by Mitchell himself.

Apple Maps Get Directions

Questions & Answers

We kindly ask that you RSVP by 12 September 2026 — two months before the wedding. This helps us finalise seating, catering, and the wine order (which Mitchell takes very seriously). You can submit your RSVP directly on this page.

Due to venue capacity, we are only able to accommodate guests who are named on the invitation. If your invitation includes a plus-one, you'll have the option to add their name when you RSVP. If you're unsure, please feel free to reach out to us directly.

Chambolle has been informed of his role as Chief Morale Officer and has expressed strong opinions about attending. Sadly, The Peninsula's strict no-Corgi policy means he will be sitting this one out — likely in his little castle in 2 Merino Gardens, deeply unimpressed. He sends his love and expects stinky treats upon our return.

Doors open at 17:00. We recommend arriving between 17:00 and 18:00 to enjoy a drink, settle in, and get a good seat for the ceremony, which begins at 18:30. The Salisbury Room is located within The Peninsula Hotel — simply follow the signage from the main lobby.

Mitchell has put considerable thought into the wine for the evening. For red, he secured an auction lot from the Hospices de Beaune 2024 — one of Burgundy's most prestigious annual sales — so expect something rather special. For white, the selection comes from his favourite label, 00 Wine, a place close to his heart having gone for the harvest there last year. If you have a particular preference or allergy, do let us know in the RSVP notes.
